---
title: "committedFactJournalCursor()"
description: "Create one immutable domain-neutral fact-stream cursor."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Create one immutable domain-neutral fact-stream cursor.

## Import

```ts
import { committedFactJournalCursor } from "@graphrefly/ts/committed-facts";
```

## Signature

```ts
function committedFactJournalCursor(
	stream: string,
	position: number,
): CommittedFactJournalCursor
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `stream` | `string` | Stable domain-owned stream identifier. |
| `position` | `number` | Non-negative safe-integer fact position. |

## Returns

A frozen strict-JSON fact-stream cursor.

## Example

```ts
import { committedFactJournalCursor } from "@graphrefly/ts/committed-facts";

const cursor = committedFactJournalCursor("work-facts", 0);
```

`packages/ts/src/committed-facts/index.ts`
